en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid documentation for Peru's Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) in the Peru Statutory Labor Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Peru Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) Policy & Affiliation

Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) is the additional insurance that provides coverage to workers who, as a result of their high-risk work, suffer an accident at work or an occupational disease. The high-risk activities that are covered by the Supplementary High-Risk Work Insurance + Protection are detailed in Annex 5 of the Regulations of Law No. 26790 , Law on the Modernization of Social Security in Health, approved by Supreme Decree No. 009-97-SA and its amendments. EsSalud/ONP
Please upload your Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) policy with EsSalud/EPS and ONP or authorized insurer.

Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) is the additional insurance that provides coverage to workers who, as a result of their high-risk work, suffer an accident at work or an occupational disease. The high-risk activities that are covered by the + Complementary Risk Work Insurance Protection are detailed in Annex 5 of the Regulations of Law No. 26790, Law on the Modernization of Social Security in Health, approved by Supreme Decree No. 009-97-SA and its amendments. EsSalud/ONP Employers must register with EsSalud and complete the process of affiliation for their workers who require Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR). Companies can request thier affiliation by using Form No. 6056.
Please upload your Supplementary Occupational Risk Insurance (SCTR) affiliation with EsSalud.
